Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPTCPM2 ;ISF/RWF - BROKER Other Service ;06/28/2012 ;;1.1;RPC BROKER;**43,45,53,59**;Mar 28, 1997;Build 2 ;Per VHA Directive 2004-038, this routine should not be modified ; Q ; OTH ;Check if some other special service. ; ZEXCEPT: DVP - set prior to call from CONNTYPE^DVPTCPM S DVPDEBUG=1 D LOG("DVP msg") S $ETRAP="D ERR^DVPTCPM2" I XWB="~DVP~" G DVP ; BNT - Digital Veterans Platform D LOG("In 0TH^XWBTCPM2 - Prefix not known: "_XWB) Q ; DVP ;Digial Veterans Platform S DVPDEBUG=1 D LOG("DHP msg") N L,HDL,RET,DVPSBUF S DVPSBUF="",HDL="",RET=$NA(^TMP("DVP_TARGET",$J)) ;S L=$$BREAD^XWBRW(999) I L S HDL=$$BREAD^XWBRW(5,,1) I HDL["~DVP~" D . D GETMSG^DVPMSG1(.RET,HDL) ; Get the DHP message . D WRITE(@RET),WBF Q ; BSE ;Broker Security Enhancement D LOG("BSE msg") N L,HDL,RET,DVPSBUF S DVPSBUF="",RET="",HDL="" S L=$$BREAD^XWBRW(3) I L S HDL=$$BREAD^XWBRW(L) I $E(HDL,1,3)="PUT" D . ;D RPUT^XUSBSE1(.RET,HDL) ;p59(REM)-RPUT^XUSBSE1 does not exsist. . Q ;Check IT I $E(HDL,1,3)'="PUT" D GETVISIT^XUSBSE1(.RET,HDL) D WRITE(RET),WBF Q ; ERR ;Error Trap D ^%ZTER G H2^XUSCLEAN ; LOG(%) ;Link to logger Q:'$G(DVPDEBUG) D LOG^DVPTCPM(%) Q ; WRITE(M,F) ;Write N L S L="" I '$G(F) S L=$E(1000+$L(M),2,4) D WRITE^XWBRW(L_M) Q WBF ;Buffer Flush D WBF^XWBRW Q ; OPEN(P1,P2) ;Open the device and set the variables D CALL^%ZISTCP(P1,P2) Q:POP S DVPTDEV=IO Q ; CALLBSE(SERVER,PORT,TOKEN,STN) ;Special Broker service N XWBDEBUG,XWBOS,XWBRBUF,XWBSBUF,XWBT,XWBTIME,IO N DEMOSTR,DVPTDEV,RET,X,POP S IO(0)=$P D INIT^DVPTCPM,LOG("CALLBSE") D OPEN(SERVER,PORT) ; if initial failure try to get web address I POP,$G(STN)'="" S SERVER=$$WEBADDRS^XUSBSE1(STN) I SERVER'="" D OPEN(SERVER,PORT) I POP Q "Didn't open connection." S DVPSBUF="",DVPRBUF="" U DVPTDEV D WRITE("~BSE~",1),WRITE(TOKEN),WBF^XWBRW S X=$$BREAD^XWBRW(3),RET="No Response" I X S RET=$$BREAD^XWBRW(X) D CLOSE^%ZISTCP,LOG("FINISH") Q RET
